steps.title: Identify the angle relationship
steps.content: The angles $x°$ and $133°$ are adjacent angles formed where transversal $l$ intersects line $j$. Since they share a common side and together form a straight angle on line $j$, they form a linear pair.

steps.title: Apply the supplementary angle property
steps.content:
Angles that form a linear pair are supplementary, meaning they sum to $180°$.
$$x + 133 = 180$$
$$x = 47$$
